role_summary: the compliance auditor ensures adherence to regulatory, statutory, and internal compliance  requirements.
responsibilities: • conduct complian ce audits and reviews   • verify adherence to laws, regulations, and internal policies   • identify compliance risks and violations   • prepare compliance audit reports   • support regulatory inspections and audits   • advise management on compliance improvements   skills & qua lifications:   • qualified ca   • strong regulatory and compliance knowledge   • attention to detail and governance focus
